translation.en: She takes care of skin nourishment.

content.sentence: Cô ấy chăm sóc ___ của da.

example.es: Necesito cuidar mi piel a diario.
example.vi: Tôi cần dưỡng da hàng ngày.
example.en: I need to take care of my skin daily.

definitions.en: To nourish or take care of something, often related to health or beauty.
definitions.vi: Nuôi dưỡng hoặc chăm sóc một cái gì đó, thường liên quan đến sức khỏe hoặc sắc đẹp.
definitions.es: Nutrir o cuidar algo, a menudo relacionado con la salud o la belleza.

exampleSentences: Chị nên ăn nhiều rau xanh để dưỡng cơ thể khỏe mạnh.
Anh thường dùng kem đặc biệt để dưỡng da vào ban đêm.
Em học cách dưỡng tóc mềm mượt bằng dầu thiên nhiên.
notes_md:
**dưỡng** = to nourish, to take care of something so it becomes healthy or stronger. It’s about feeding, restoring, or maintaining health/condition.

It often goes with body-related nouns: **dưỡng sức** (recover energy), **dưỡng bệnh** (rest to recover), **dưỡng ẩm** (moisturize), **nuôi dưỡng** (raise/nurture). It can be physical (body, skin) or abstract (feelings, dreams).


Close friend: **nuôi dưỡng** (more about raising or developing over time).
notes:
dưỡng = to nourish, to take care of something so it becomes healthy or stronger. It’s about feeding, restoring, or maintaining health/condition.

It often goes with body-related nouns: dưỡng sức (recover energy), dưỡng bệnh (rest to recover), dưỡng ẩm (moisturize), nuôi dưỡng (raise/nurture). It can be physical (body, skin) or abstract (feelings, dreams).

Close friend: nuôi dưỡng (more about raising or developing over time).
exampleSentencesTranslated: You should eat more green vegetables to nourish your body.
He often uses a special cream to nourish his skin at night.
I am learning how to nourish my hair to make it smooth using natural oil.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần mua ___ cho cây.

translation.en: We need to buy nourishment for the plants.
